stories.headline: Partial restoration of internet in Iran after 88-day nationwide blackout

perspectives.label: Independent
perspectives.body: 📈 Confirmed: Live metrics show a partial restoration to internet connectivity in #Iran on day 88, after 2093 hours of near-total isolation from international networks, the longest nationwide internet shutdown in modern history. It is unclear if the restoration will be sustained.

stories.headline: US Navy resumes 'Project Freedom' ship escorts through Strait of Hormuz near Iran

perspectives.label: Independent
perspectives.body: The U.S. Navy has resumed operations in the Strait of Hormuz under “Project Freedom,” a previously announced and quickly suspended initiative to escort commercial vessels - including cargo ships and tankers - through the vital shipping corridor near Iran, U.S. military officials tell The Wall Street Journal.

stories.headline: President Trump’s Big Beautiful Bill and Iran-related spending projected to cause $2 trillion federal budget deficit in 2026

perspectives.label: Conservative
perspectives.body: The President’s Big Beautiful Bill, the Iran War, and Republican spending bills will create a $2 trillion budget DEFICIT in 2026. Financing just the new debt costs more than all federal road & bridge projects, and we will be making those new interest payments each year, forever.

stories.headline: Trump to convene first Cabinet meeting at Camp David amid ongoing Iran negotiations

perspectives.label: Conservative
perspectives.body: BREAKING: President Trump will convene a rare Cabinet meeting at Camp David on Wednesday as negotiations with Iran enter a critical phase. All Cabinet members are expected to attend the meeting, Fox News has confirmed, including outgoing Director of National Intelligence Tulsi Gabbard. The gathering comes as the administration weighs next steps in high-stakes negotiations aimed at securing a broader agreement with Tehran amid a fraying ceasefire.

perspectives.label: Independent
perspectives.body: Trump to host Cabinet meeting at Camp David on Wednesday as Iran talks continue https://www.cnbc.com/2026/05/26/trump-camp-david-iran-cabinet.html?taid=6a15b20242698e0001d2b943&utm_campaign=trueanthem&utm_content=main&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter

stories.headline: MicroStrategy completes $1.5B convertible notes repurchase
stories.body: Strategy, $MSTR, has completed the repurchase of $1.5 billion of its 2029 Convertible Notes at an ~8% discount to par, generating an incremental 0.7% BTC Yield and lowering aggregate debt to $6.7 billion.

stories.headline: Michael Burry comments on NVIDIA demand concentration
stories.body: "NVIDIA is benefitting from strong demand, but is selling into a concentrated set of buyers whose own demand is being distorted by a training and benchmarking phase that will not last," Michael Burry has said.

stories.headline: Kewpie shares easy microwave banbanji recipe
stories.body:
深ごま:焼肉のたれ＝1:1で味が決まる！
電子レンジで簡単バンバンジー😋

【作り方】(2人分)
鶏むね肉(1枚)は耐熱容器に入れ、塩少々、酒と水各大さじ1をふりラップをし、レンジで火が通るまで加熱。粗熱をとり太めにさく。拍子木切りにしたきゅうりと一緒に、焼肉のたれと深煎りごまドレッシングを1:1で混ぜたたれをかける。

***UPDATED INCIDENT MAP***

stories.headline: Evacuation zone shrinks around failing chemical tank in Southern California
stories.body:
The evacuation zone around a failing chemical tank in Southern California is shrinking after officials said the "worst-case scenario" of a catastrophic explosion has been averted.

ABC News’ Trevor Ault has the latest. 

Read more at the link in bio. https://abcnews.com/US/chemical-tank-southern-california-longer-threat-explosion-officials/story?utm_source=twitter&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=dhtwitter&utm_content=app.dashsocial.com/abcnews/library/media/677194743&id=133286870

stories.headline: Owner of pro-Trump house in Escondido dies after assault
stories.body:
Owner of iconic pro-Trump 'Trump House' in southern California dead after a stranger allegedly punched him in the jaw, then struck him repeatedly in the head outside his own property.

Kerry Sheron, 69, a U.S. Army veteran, spent years decorating his Escondido home with American flags and Trump memorabilia — and spent years enduring complaints and vandalism because of it.

The suspect, 32-year-old Thomas Caleb Butler, faces attempted murder charges. The DA's office now reviews whether to upgrade them.

Credit: Kerry Sheron via Facebook

The end goal is a lasting peace and stability in the Middle East, and the world, after Deep State tentacles have been cut.

Trump began setting this up years ago.
